results.title: Obituary | Wallace D. Conner | Community Family Funeral Home
results.snippet: Wally had been employed at Proko Industries in Cambridge City for 31 years, 17 of those years he was Plant Manager . He was also employed at Primex Plastics in the Shipping Department for 21 years. Wally served our country with the United States Army where he was a Sgt First Class in the Korean War from 1951-1953.
